ab: siRab masulun iku tu tama ku matiw melaut tu baqi ku ti angawan.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔angaw。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: meluzit ti zapan na ni baqi angaw.
semanu aizipna timaimi, satangan senizasan na leppaw na.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: yau paqangi tu senizasan aizipna nani, temibuq ti nizi ta senizasan.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: mazas tama ku tu ’si na qabaw seRay dadas bula tu baqi.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: sidadak imi aiku seRay baqi ku ti angaw ta qinpanan, muwaza nipakungku na.
ch: 我和angaw叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: qitu iku matanaq nani, muRebu ti baqi angaw semanu timaiku, “ibabaw ti isu, melabulil ti qaya.”
ch: 我要離開前，angaw叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: semanu iku timaizipana, “baqi, anu nengi ti zapan su si, qawtu ka sa leppaw niaq yu!”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, “When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us.”
